{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231946519E07FBBA17D63E1E3654"}"},"total":1150},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7292489736302740236","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"4个小时看完，怎么说呢，十分精彩，剧情对我来说有点哈人（一晚上没睡），人物描写方面也是比较细致。
最后呢，也是十分推荐阅读。当然了，作者大大如果可以的话多写点番外篇，我可不希望这本书后期只能在书架里吃灰。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697920536,"group_id":"7186313388325080099","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"孤星失月，浮萍坠尘。
旧栖新垅，南窗霖止。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4v5S72ps2XSK72DoXSdsppqYxjf4pC43qpWRC9C68Nw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/959ab844e1a84dec97962cc5a75214d8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797089&x-signature=mB%2Bh%2B%2Bkqb7UJJgIMo3MDBHNResM%3D","user_id":"1191462000923284","user_name":"孤星失月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1191462000923284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186313388325080099","book_info":{"abstract":"【变百+诸多原创怪谈副本+很多漂亮的女诡异+贴贴贴贴贴】
表白校花被拒的林晓，下一秒被选为【龙国天选者】，进入怪谈世界！
他选择女号，爆出女神系统。
 第二副本，她出现了——
一个唱着《天黑黑》就能杀人的病娇少女。
而林晓唯一能阻止她的方式，就是……​​用嘴堵住她的歌声​​。
于是，画风逐渐离谱：
​​别人在解密，她在和陆小美贴贴。​​
​​别人在逃命，她在用吻封印陆小美的杀人歌。​​
​​别人在恐惧，她在思考怎么把诡异女友带回现实……​​
而当她们终于通关所有副本，回到现实世界后——
​​陆小美搂着她的脖子，笑吟吟地问：​​
​​“现在，我们可以没羞没臊地生活了吧？”​​
林晓：“……”
